CustomField.formula:
IF( TEXT(Third_Shipping_Company__c) = "Fedex", "https://www.fedex.com/apps/fedextrack/index.html?tracknumbers=" + Third_Tracking_Num__c + "&cntry_code=us",
IF( TEXT(Third_Shipping_Company__c) = "UPS", "https://www.ups.com/track?loc=en_US&tracknum=" + Third_Tracking_Num__c + "&requester=WT/trackdetails",
IF( TEXT(Third_Shipping_Company__c) = "USPS", "https://tools.usps.com/go/TrackConfirmAction?tRef=fullpage&tLc=2&text28777=&tLabels=" + Third_Tracking_Num__c,
IF( TEXT(Third_Shipping_Company__c) = "DHL eCommerce", "https://www.dhl.com/us-en/home/tracking.html?tracking-id=" + Third_Tracking_Num__c,
NULL ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 3rd Tracking URL
